compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Why

PyPI/wheel installs have no rebar git checkout, so live-git SHA resolution
(story 1) yields version-only there. Baking the release commit SHA at build time
gives consistent gate-code provenance across dev/editable and PyPI installs
(epic jira-reb-596).

## What

- Add `hatch_build.py` at the **repo root** implementing `BuildHookInterface`; it
  runs `git rev-parse --short HEAD` at wheel/sdist build and writes a generated,
  git-ignored `src/rebar/_build_info.py` (`COMMIT = "<sha>"`, or `COMMIT = None`
  when built outside a git tree).
- Register it in `pyproject.toml` with a `[tool.hatch.build.hooks.custom]` stanza
  (WITHOUT this, hatchling silently skips the hook and the baked SHA never ships).
- Add `src/rebar/_build_info.py` to `.gitignore` AND to the `artifacts` glob under
  `[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel]` (git-based source discovery drops git-ignored
  files from the wheel otherwise — the baked SHA would never reach PyPI).
- Extend the story-1 resolver fallback to **live-git-first, build-baked-second,
  omit-last**: with no live checkout, import `_build_info.COMMIT`.
- Keep package version STATIC (`pyproject.toml` `version`); do NOT adopt hatch-vcs.

## Scope

Build-time SHA capture + fallback wiring only. Depends on story 1's resolver.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `hatch_build.py` writes `src/rebar/_build_info.py` with the build-time short
      SHA; a non-git build writes `COMMIT = None` (graceful).
- [ ] `[tool.hatch.build.hooks.custom]` is registered AND `_build_info.py` is in
      the wheel `artifacts` glob and `.gitignore`.
- [ ] Resolver falls back to the baked SHA on a non-git install, still preferring
      the live checkout SHA when one exists.
- [ ] Package version remains static (no hatch-vcs).
- [ ] Tests: baked-fallback resolves the SHA when live git is absent; version-only
      when both absent; a built wheel actually contains `_build_info.py` with a SHA.

file_impact.reason: hatchling build hook baking commit SHA

compiled_state.title: Bake release commit SHA at build time for non-git installs
